zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Meath of Walton於大約1145年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Gilbert De Waleton24歲，母親Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton22歲。他與Cecily de Vernai結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1203年被列為cleric of swineford 。他去世於1235年在英國藍卡爾海爾享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Meath of Walton于大约1145年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Gilbert De Waleton24岁，母亲Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton22岁。他与Cecily de Vernai结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1203年被列为cleric of swineford 。他去世于1235年在英国藍卡爾海爾享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Walton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Walton, which are named with Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala), wald ‘woodland’, wall ‘wall’, or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

History: George Walton (1741–1804) signed the Declaration of Independence. He was born in Prince Edward County, VA, whither his grandfather had emigrated from England in 1682. He moved to Savannah, GA, and became governor of GA and a prominent jurist.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Meath
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name for someone who lived on a patch of heathland (Old English hǣð).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Meath of Walton was born about 1145, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert De Waleton, was 24 and his mother, Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton, was 22. He married Cecily de Vernai. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1203, his occupation is listed as cleric of swineford . He died in 1235, in Hale, Lancashire, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Meath of Walton est né environ 1145, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert De Waleton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Cecily de Vernai. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1203, sa profession de son indiquée est cleric of swineford . Il est décédé en 1235, à Hale, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Meath of Walton um 1145 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert De Waleton 24 und seine Mutter Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton 22. Er hat Cecily de Vernai geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1203 ist sein Beruf als cleric of swineford  aufgeführt. Er starb 1235 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Hale, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Meath of Walton è nato il circa 1145 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert De Waleton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Cecily de Vernai. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1203, la sua occupazione è indicata come cleric of swineford . Morì nel 1235, nel Hale, Lancashire, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Meath of Waltonが約1145年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Gilbert De Waletonは24歳，母Mrs. Gilbert de Waletonは22歳であった。Cecily de Vernaiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1203年，職業はcleric of swineford と記録されている。彼は1235年にイギリスランカシュアイアヘイルで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Meath of Walton(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert De Waleton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Cecily de Vernai(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1203년, 그의 직업은 cleric of swineford 이었다. 그는 1235년 영국 랭카실르 헤일에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Meath of Walton nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert De Waleton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily de Vernai. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1203, sua profissão aparece como cleric of swineford . Ele faleceu em 1235, em Hale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Meath of Walton родился около 1145 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert De Waleton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily de Vernai. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1203 году он работал по профессии cleric of swineford . Он умер в 1235 г. в местности хэл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

sm.from 1203 to 1207: mai le 1203 e o'o I le 1207

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Meath of Walton nació aproximadamente 1145, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilbert De Waleton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mrs. Gilbert de Waleton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Cecily de Vernai. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1203, su ocupación registrada era cleric of swineford . Murió en 1235, en Hale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
